title: hydrocotyle ramiflora var. maritima
intro: Hydrocotyle ramiflora var. maritima, also known as Pacific Pennywort or Coastal Pennywort, is a species of aquatic plant that belongs to the genus Hydrocotyle. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have various health benefits such as reducing swelling and pain, and supporting digestive and respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Hydrocotyle ramiflora var. maritima are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments. Additionally, the plant's extracts have been found to have antioxidant and hepatoprotective properties, making it a potential natural remedy for liver protection and other health conditions.
